children.label: A
children.text: coastal areas of covered States; and
to enhance resource availability of National Park Service and National Wildlife Refuge System management units to implement coral reef conservation and restoration activities;
to complement the other conservation and assistance activities conducted under this Act or the Coral Reef Conservation Act of 2000 [ et seq.], as amended by section 10001; and16 U.S.C. 6401

to provide other technical, scientific, and financial assistance and conduct conservation and restoration activities that advance the purposes of this title and the Coral Reef Conservation Act of 2000, as amended by this division.

children.heading: Consultation with the Department of Commerce
children.label: c Consultation with the Department of Commerce

children.heading: Coral reef conservation and restoration activities
children.label: 1 Coral reef conservation and restoration activities
children.text: The Secretary of the Interior may consult with the Secretary of Commerce regarding the conduct of any activities to conserve and restore coral reefs and coral reef ecosystems in waters managed under the jurisdiction of the Federal agencies specified in paragraphs (2) and (3) of section 203(c) of the Coral Reef Conservation Act of 2000 [, (3)], as added by this division.16 U.S.C. 6402(c)(2)

children.heading: Award of Coral Reef Management Fellowship
children.label: 2 Award of Coral Reef Management Fellowship
children.text: The Secretary of the Interior shall consult with the Secretary of Commerce to award the Susan L. Williams Coral Reef Management Fellowship under subchapter III of this chapter.
are consistent with the National Coral Reef Resilience Strategy; and
support and enhance the success of coral reef action plans in effect under section 205 of the Coral Reef Conservation Act of 2000 [], as added by this division.16 U.S.C. 6404

children.heading: Conservation, coral, coral reef, etc.
children.label: 1 Conservation, coral, coral reef, etc.
children.text: The terms “conservation”, “coral reef”, “covered reef manager”, “covered State”, “National Coral Reef Resilience Strategy”, “restoration”, and “State” have the meanings given those terms in section 216 of the Coral Reef Conservation Act of 2000 [], as added by this division.16 U.S.C. 6415

children.heading: Tribe; Tribal
children.label: 2 Tribe; Tribal
children.text: The terms “Tribe” and “Tribal” refer to Indian Tribes (as defined in ).section 5130 of title 25
